hero.name: NATAN VIRGÍLIO
hero.belief_text: Good design solves real problems and delivers measurable results. It reduces support costs, increases retention, and drives profit. It turns complexity into clarity and friction into flow.

global.description: Natan Virgílio's portfolio — Product Designer specialized in high-complexity systems, GovTech, and end-to-end execution. From ethnographic Discovery to full technical Handoff.

home.title: Home
home.description: Natan Virgílio — UX/UI Product Designer with case studies in GovTech and complex systems. Portfolio with full process: research, prototype, technical specification, and development handoff.

about.title: About Me
about.description: Product Designer with end-to-end expertise in complex systems and GovTech. Hands-on experience in User Research, Design Systems, WCAG 2.2 accessibility, and technical handoff — with engineering autonomy in HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, and Next.js.
